titles.title: Lead Me to the Cross – V2

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v6 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Savior I come Quiet my soul, remember Redemption's hill Where Your blood was spilled For my ransom Everything I once held dear I count it all as lost

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lead me to the cross Where Your love poured out Bring me to my knees Lord I lay me down Rid me of myself I belong to You Oh, lead me, lead me to the cross

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You were as I Tempted and trialed Human The word became flesh Bore my sin and death Now you're risen

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Everything I once held dear I count it all as lost

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: To Your heart To Your heart Lead me to Your heart Lead me to Your heart

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Lead me to the cross Where Your love poured out Bring me to my knees Lord I lay me down Rid me of myself I belong to You Oh, lead me, lead me
